# mtncloud_monitoring_group (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud monitoring check group by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_monitoring_group" "frontends" {
  name = "frontends"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the check group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `check_ids` (Set of Number) IDs of the member checks.
- `description` (String) Description of the check group.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the check group.
- `min_happy` (Number) Minimum number of member checks that must be happy.
- `severity` (String) Maximum severity this group can incur.
